summary: prism-store modules that persist memory projections and memory-store state separately from the primary graph/history tables.
evidence: `prism-store/src/lib.rs` exposes memory_projection and memory_store as distinct persistence pieces beside graph/sqlite/store.
This split matters because PRISM memory durability rides on projection-specific storage rather than only the main graph tables.
risk_hint: If this layer drifts, memory hydration may look semantically valid while reading stale or mismatched persisted state.
